idea-plugin.name: NanoAgent
idea-plugin.description:
NanoAgent - AI Coding Agent

NanoAgent brings an autonomous AI coding assistant directly into your IDE. It can read and edit files, run shell commands, search code, browse the web, and more — all through natural language conversations.

  • Autonomous: The agent plans and executes multi-step tasks
  • Context-aware: Understands your project structure and code
  • Tool-rich: File operations, shell, browser, search, and more
  • Session management: Save and resume conversations
idea-plugin.change-notes:
v0.1.0

  • Initial release with ACP-based communication
  • Chat tool window for interacting with NanoAgent
  • Session management
  • Streaming responses
